content: The intrinsic reward signals that power curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, where only surprising, unpredicted state transitions get stored in long-term episodic memory rather than retaining all experienced observations. This creates a self-organizing memory system that automatically prioritizes high-information content that drives both better active learning sampling and more efficient exploration.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
